{{CargoRelic
|name=Nine White Banners
|class_id=21250
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Nine White Banners, also known as the Chagan Sulde, is a symbol of Mongolian power and spirit, originating from the time of Genghis Khan. It is not only the emblem flag of the Mongol Empire but also the guardian deity of the army, symbolizing victory, happiness, and auspiciousness. The tassels of the Nine White Banners are made from the mane of a silver-white stallion, the flagpole is made of pine wood, and the top of the main Sulde is decorated with a gilded trident, symbolizing flames.
|fame=74
|art=40
|fth=35
|civ=44
|tech=50
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
